title: History and Autofill
drDigitalIntro: Safari remembers everywhere you go — that's History. Click Bookmarks > Show History or press Command+Y to see all the sites you've visited. You can search for something you saw earlier. Autofill automatically fills in forms with information Safari knows: your name, address, phone number, or credit card (if you've saved it). When you type in a form, Safari suggests what to fill.

options.text: A log of websites you've visited

drDigitalSuccess: History is a complete log of your past visits — useful for finding something you saw but forgot to bookmark.
drDigitalHint: History records the past. Think: where have I been?
